summary: PR 2722 made small source, symbol, and split-boundary edits to improve GALE01 data matching, especially for ifprize data/sdata2, sobjlib bss/sbss, ifcoget bss, and several item/baselib data sections. Evidence includes a bot report showing +2242 matched data bytes and 23 new matches, but the PR body was empty and there were no human review comments.

key_files.role: Adjusted split section ownership and boundaries for itlinkbomb, itpikachuthunder, ifprize, ifcoget, textdraw, and baselib cobj.
Refined symbol sizes/scopes/data classifications, including splitting ifprize string labels and resizing HSD_SObjLib bss/sbss/sdata2 symbols.
Changed sqrtf constants from static const doubles to inline numeric literals.
Added static bss array un_804A1F48[0x10], aligning with split bss ownership change.
evidence_refs: diff:splits.txt ifcoget bss start moved to 0x804A1F48

key_files.role: Extracted archive/SIS setup into static setArchive helper with note that it is needed for .data ordering.
Adjusted includes and added order_sdata2 helper that references float literals to influence sdata2 ordering.
Adjusted includes and changed pika_scale from static inline to static, accompanying sdata/sdata2 match changes.
Replaced local filename string plus raw __assert with order_data helper using __FILE__ and HSD_ASSERT(287, sobj).

what_changed: Updated GALE01 split ranges to move ifprize rodata ownership to textdraw, move ifprize bss range into ifcoget, and shrink several data/sdata/sdata2 ranges.
Updated symbols metadata by splitting lbl_803F9D84 into multiple local string symbols and revising HSD_SObjLib symbol sizes/scopes.
Removed static const double _half/_three from sqrtf and used 0.5 and 3.0 literals directly.
Added a static un_804A1F48[0x10] bss object in ifcoget.
Factored ifprize archive setup into setArchive(), explicitly annotated as needed for .data ordering.
Added order_sdata2() in itlinkbomb containing unused float literal references.
Changed itpikachuthunder pika_scale from static inline to static and swapped item collision include from it_266F.h to itgroundcoll.h in item files.
In sobjlib, replaced static filename[] and direct __assert(filename, 0x11F, "sobj") with HSD_ASSERT(287, sobj), plus an order_data() helper that references __FILE__.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired source edits with corresponding split/symbol metadata changes rather than changing source alone.
Raw assert expansion in sobjlib was collapsed to HSD_ASSERT when the line number and condition were preserved.
Inlining ordinary constants in sqrtf avoided owning _half/_three as named static data.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For data-match PRs, source edits, symbol metadata, and split boundaries may need to move together; otherwise a code-looking change may actually be fixing section ownership or data layout.
When an assert expansion has a known file/line/condition, replacing direct __assert with the project assertion macro can both improve source shape and preserve matching.
Named static constants can perturb data ownership; ordinary numeric literals should remain inline when no separate data symbol ownership is supported.

naming_conventions.name: setArchive
naming_conventions.observation: A semantic static helper name was introduced for ifprize archive/SIS setup, with an explicit comment tying the extraction to .data ordering.

naming_conventions.name: order_data / order_sdata2
naming_conventions.observation: Helper names explicitly described data-section ordering intent, but evidence only shows these local PR tactics, not a general naming standard.

naming_conventions.name: lbl_803F9D84 family
naming_conventions.observation: Address-style labels were retained while refining metadata into multiple local string symbols, avoiding unsupported semantic renames.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use split-boundary and symbol-size corrections to reassign data ownership and improve data matching.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: The PR evidence shows the changes and match report, but not the underlying map/symbol reasoning.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce small static helper functions to affect data ordering.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Current decomp standards require explicit evidence for data-order tactics and warn against fake data anchors; this PR slice only provides the bot match report, not a rationale proving the tactic is authored source.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Change inline/static helper shape to influence code/data matching.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: No reviewer explanation is available for why the linkage/inline change was necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace direct static filename storage used by assert expansion with __FILE__ plus HSD_ASSERT.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Supported by assert macro cleanup standards, but the PR evidence does not include separate objdiff details beyond bot aggregate match results.

notes: Strong evidence for changed files, exact diff content, merge metadata, and bot-reported match improvements.
PR body was empty and there were no review comments or reviews, so author intent and reviewer acceptance rationale are mostly unavailable.
The bot report provides aggregate match improvement evidence, but not full objdiff logs or reasoning for each local tactic.
Some tactics in this historical PR, especially order_data/order_sdata2 helpers, may conflict with or require scrutiny under current data-ownership and matching-tactics standards.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Data-match PRs may require coordinated source, split, and symbol metadata edits
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2722 improved GALE01 matched data by changing source files together with config/GALE01/splits.txt and config/GALE01/symbols.txt. The bot report recorded +2242 matched data bytes and 23 new matches.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer project assert macros over recovered raw __assert when line and condition match
accepted_candidate_records.text: In sobjlib, direct __assert(filename, 0x11F, "sobj") was replaced with HSD_ASSERT(287, sobj), while an order_data helper handled file string ordering separately.

source_update_candidates.title: Use PR 2722 as a cautionary example for data-order helper tactics
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2722 introduced helpers named order_data and order_sdata2, and a setArchive helper explicitly noted as needed for .data ordering. Current standards should decide whether this historical pattern is an allowed narrow tactic with verifier evidence or an anti-pattern example under literals/data ownership and matching-tactics guidance.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence supports that these helpers were used and the match improved, but not enough to promote the pattern as generally accepted style.

source_update_candidates.title: ifprize/ifcoget/textdraw split ownership changed in PR 2722
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2722 removed ifprize rodata and bss split entries, moved ifcoget bss start to 0x804A1F48, and added textdraw rodata 0x803B8790-0x803B8810.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful as path-scoped history for future data ownership investigations, pending curator validation against current source.

source_update_candidates.title: ifprize string label split around 0x803F9D84
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2722 changed one lbl_803F9D84 object of size 0x84 into multiple local string symbols at lbl_803F9D84, lbl_803F9D9A, lbl_803F9DA8, lbl_803F9DB6, lbl_803F9DC4, and lbl_803F9DE1.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful data-symbol ownership note; should be checked against current symbol map before ingestion.

rejection_notes: Do not promote order_data/order_sdata2 helper functions as a general accepted standard from this PR alone; there is no human review rationale and current standards require explicit evidence for such tactics.
Do not infer that all static const float/double objects should be inlined; this PR only shows sqrtf _half/_three being changed to literals.
Do not infer semantic names for lbl_803F9D84 string labels; the PR retained address-style labels.
